mapper.select:
select A.grant_seq , A.SUSER_ID, A.SUSER_GRADE_CD, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID, A.nrequest_type_cd, A.NREQUEST_TYPE_NM ,A.SUSER_NM , A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID , A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM, A.SPOS_DEPT_FULL_NM, A.RNUM from (select A.grant_seq , A.SUSER_ID, A.SUSER_GRADE_CD, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID, A.nrequest_type_cd, A.NREQUEST_TYPE_NM ,A.SUSER_NM , A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID , A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM, A.SPOS_DEPT_FULL_NM, ROWNUM RNUM FROM (SELECT A.grant_seq , A.SUSER_ID, A.SUSER_GRADE_CD, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID, A.nrequest_type_cd, (select node_type_nm from mst.tb_node_transfer_type where node_type_cd =A.nrequest_type_cd ) AS NREQUEST_TYPE_NM ,B.SUSER_NM , B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID , C.SORG_NM AS SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM ,(SELECT STRING_AGG(SORG_NM,'-') FROM (SELECT SORG_NM FROM MST.TB_ORG_BAS AS G START WITH G.SKT_ORG_ID = B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID CONNECT BY G.SKT_ORG_ID = PRIOR G.SUP_KT_ORG_ID ORDER BY G.SORG_PREF_ODRG) ) AS SPOS_DEPT_FULL_NM FROM MST.tb_user_grant A , MST.TB_USER_BAS B , MST.TB_ORG_BAS C
AND A.SUSER_ID = B.SUSER_ID(+) AND B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = C.SKT_ORG_ID(+) ORDER BY A.grant_seq desc ) A where ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex}) A where RNUM >= #{firstIndex}

select count(1) FROM MST.tb_user_grant A , MST.TB_USER_BAS B , MST.TB_ORG_BAS C
AND A.SUSER_ID = B.SUSER_ID(+) AND B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = C.SKT_ORG_ID(+)
mapper.insert:
select NEXTVAL('mst.tb_user_grant_seq')
insert into mst.tb_user_grant( grant_seq, suser_nm, suser_id, suser_grade_cd, nrequest_type_cd, screate_id, smodify_id ) values( #{grantSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{suserNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{suserId, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{suserGradeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'nod001', #{suserId, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{suserId, jdbcType=CHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.SUSER_ID, A.SUSER_GRADE_CD, A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID ,B.SUSER_NM , B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID , C.SORG_NM AS SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM , (SELECT STRING_AGG(SORG_NM,'-') FROM (SELECT SORG_NM FROM MST.TB_ORG_BAS AS G START WITH G.SKT_ORG_ID = B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID CONNECT BY G.SKT_ORG_ID = PRIOR G.SUP_KT_ORG_ID ORDER BY G.SORG_PREF_ODRG) ) AS SPOS_DEPT_FULL_NM , D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , E.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , D.SSVC_GROUP_CD , D.SSVC_OBJ_CD , F.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , G.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , H.SUSER_GRADE_NM FROM MST.tb_user_auth_txn_sub A , MST.TB_USER_BAS B , MST.TB_ORG_BAS C , MST.TB_LVL_BAS D , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD E , MST.TB_LVL_CD F , MST.TB_LVL_CD G , MST.TB_USER_GRADE_CD H WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GRANT_SEQ = #{grantSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND A.SUSER_ID = B.SUSER_ID(+) AND B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = C.SKT_ORG_ID(+) AND A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ = D.NLVL_BAS_SEQ(+) AND D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = E.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND D.SSVC_GROUP_CD = F.SLVL_CD (+) AND D.SSVC_OBJ_CD = G.SLVL_CD (+) AND A.SUSER_GRADE_CD = H.SUSER_GRADE_CD(+)

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.tb_user_auth_txn_sub A , MST.TB_USER_BAS B , MST.TB_ORG_BAS C , MST.TB_LVL_BAS D , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD E , MST.TB_LVL_CD F , MST.TB_LVL_CD G , MST.TB_USER_GRADE_CD H WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GRANT_SEQ = #{grantSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND A.SUSER_ID = B.SUSER_ID(+) AND B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = C.SKT_ORG_ID(+) AND A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ = D.NLVL_BAS_SEQ(+) AND D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = E.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND D.SSVC_GROUP_CD = F.SLVL_CD (+) AND D.SSVC_OBJ_CD = G.SLVL_CD (+) AND A.SUSER_GRADE_CD = H.SUSER_GRADE_CD(+)
SELECT nrequest_type_cd FROM mst.tb_user_grant A WHERE A.GRANT_SEQ = #{grantSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mst.tb_user_grant A WHERE A.grant_seq = #{grantSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
DELETE FROM mst.tb_user_auth_txn_sub A WHERE nuser_auth_sub_seq in (select nuser_auth_sub_seq where grant_seq = #{grantSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.select: SELECT A.grant_seq , A.SUSER_ID, A.SUSER_GRADE_CD, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID, A.nrequest_type_cd, (select node_type_nm from mst.tb_node_transfer_type where node_type_cd =A.nrequest_type_cd ) AS NREQUEST_TYPE_NM ,B.SUSER_NM , B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID , C.SORG_NM AS SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM ,(SELECT STRING_AGG(SORG_NM,'-') FROM (SELECT SORG_NM FROM MST.TB_ORG_BAS AS G START WITH G.SKT_ORG_ID = B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID CONNECT BY G.SKT_ORG_ID = PRIOR G.SUP_KT_ORG_ID ORDER BY G.SORG_PREF_ODRG) ) AS SPOS_DEPT_FULL_NM FROM MST.tb_user_grant A , MST.TB_USER_BAS B , MST.TB_ORG_BAS C where grant_seq = #{grantSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} and A.SUSER_ID = B.SUSER_ID(+) AND B.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = C.SKT_ORG_ID(+);
